problem id: 4ee88170
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND NOT SHL(2)

examples:
  01101111 -> 01000001
  10101000 -> 00010101
  10000000 -> 00010000
  00010101 -> 10100010
  10011001 -> 00010011
  10010110 -> 10000010
  10101100 -> 00000101
  00001001 -> 00000001

query: 01110111
predicted answer: 00100010
